reviews.review_description: Does not work. Game launches and nothing happens.

developer_response.body:
Hi we are sorry to hear that! That could be an hardware related issue. Please clear your room history in the device settings to get it working again.
Wish you a lot of fun and a wonderful Christmas time!

reviews.review_description: This game transforms your room in an amazing way. If you liked "First Encounters", you gonna love this one too. This game is awesome, thats all I have to say.

update: sorry developers but it would be better to remove that ice wall that appears near the wall, or make it appear when it is really very close to the real wall.

or give me an option in the menu to disable it please, because it is really annoying to see it in front of me as soon as I get close to the wall

for me it is enough that when I get close to the wall with the controller that little circle appears around the controller that shows me reality, thanks

----------


I'm removing a star because in single player mode I want to play offline, I don't want to be forced to open the internet connection just to enter this game and play alone. Also because I don't have a good internet connection. 

That said, the game is great thanks to the idea of ​​progressive room virtualization. I saw your site and saw that you are a young development team and I would like to support you. 

The idea that if the player gets too close to the virtualized wall it becomes ice to prevent the player from colliding with the controllers against the wall is a good idea but it is too conservative, in fact the freezing of the wall happens anyway when it's too far from that! 

I understand that people can get hurt but I would like the wall to freeze when I'm about 10cm away with the controllers, and not when there's still a meter to go! 

Or I would like to have the feature to turn off the ice wall so that it can bring you very close to the borders. 

After all, your other game House Defender works very well without needing to limit the player's freedom, it allows me to get close to walls without problems and it's better that way! 

If you have Discord, I would like to join the channel. Thank you
I really enjoyed it with my daughter
I cannot get it to work!!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi,
We’re sorry to hear about the issue you encountered. Could you share a few more details about the problem? That would help us better understand and assist you.

If you’re having trouble starting the app, please try reinstalling it and ensure your room is set up properly.

Best regards,

reviews.review_description:
-Difficulty peaks after a few waves
  Not an amazing gamer and I only died because I got bored not because of the enemies.

-Needs more info about the multiplayer aspect available
  How many player is this?
  Is it co-location only?
  letting the players know that only one player needs to make a super detailed scan. 

-Bug testing and reliability
  Crashed a lot while trying to set up scans and trying to join other players.
  Didn't crash while playing the game though so that's good.
  Pass though on quest 3 is tinged blue and grainer in this game for some reason.

developer_response.body:
Hi Billbo_Baggins,

thank you very much for your feedback! We are sorry that the game crashes during the room scan. Unfortunately, we can't adjust the room setup as it is Meta-related.

We’ve added your recommendations to our feature list and hope to convince you with the next update :) By the way, the blue tint in the passthrough is intentional – it’s meant to give you the feeling that your room is freezing.

Best regards,
The Dev Team

reviews.review_description: This was just TOO much fun to play, and I have to admit I did pretty bad the first try because it took me a while to understand how to recharge the snow cannon. I do wish the little snow guns could charge up much faster or didn't run low so quickly. Those little tree stump monster things gathered around me and  beat me up real bad while I was recharging the cannon. LOL. Very fun game. Thank you!!

developer_response.body: Thanks PhrozenSmoke for your review! We are glad that you like our game :)

reviews.review_description:
My room is scanned... Completely. 

Yet this game would not move past the rescan/complete part right at the start. 

I scanned, and rescanned, then did it once more for good measure. Did not work. 

Considering I have played other mixed reality games without issue, I am going to blame this on an error with the game. 

Not sure who these people all giving high marks are, but I cannot be the first to have an issue.

developer_response.body:
Thank you Fa1coneri for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We’re sorry to hear that you’ve encountered issues with our game.

We’re not entirely sure what might be causing this error, but have you tried restarting the app after scanning the room? This often helps resolve such issues. In the meantime, please know that we are actively working on a solution. If you continue to experience difficulties, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us. We want to ensure you have a seamless gaming experience.

Thank you for your understanding and patience.

reviews.review_description:
After playing countless rounds together with a friend, I must say that this is one of the must have games in the store. I haven't seen any game making use of the entire room before. After scanning the room (for safety reasons it's very important to scan EVERYTHING) enemies appear from behind the walls tearing them down and turning the room into a icy land. It's crazy how safely you can navigate through your room without having to fear tripping over your couch.

It's fun, short and a very beginner friendly experience that I have shown to a bunch of my friends. I would like to see more of these type of games that really use these features :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good feedback! We're glad you and your friends like it. To many more games that use these features of our SDK :)

reviews.review_description: This is great. a lot of fun and watch out for those snow creatures. keep a close eye out because they are sneaky and chew on your legs. Thank you for a great adventure.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good feedback! We're glad you like it :)

reviews.review_description: Great MR game, much like first encounters but better. It gets intenser too. Great transformation from your furniture into the game. The game should turn off your guardian by default. I've known other mr games that turned it off automatically. Other than that, another good MR experience to show friends and family

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good feedback! We're glad you like it :)

reviews.review_description: Went into this not expecting much, but I think this is my new favourite mixed reality experience. although it is a simple game it is so cool and the way they slowly break Your walls is awesome and when the little monster things started flooding into my room it genuinely freaked me out in a good way. Anyways definitely recommend people try this

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good feedback! We're glad you like it. You should definitely try it out in multiplayer or in different rooms too, it gives you a completely different feel :)

reviews.review_description:
An excellent option to start in mixed reality and end in virtual reality.
As suggestions for improvement we have:
When entering multiplayer mode and selecting the create room option, add a return icon to the menu, since after the room is created the only option available is to start the game.
The same thing happens when joining the room, if by chance you misspell the room name, you are left searching and there is no way to go back to correct the name and try to join again.
If possible, set a little more speed with which the first monsters come out of the game, since the first minutes are quite slow, otherwise as the level of difficulty increases and the wave of monsters increases as time passes, it is excellent. very entertaining.
If possible add the Spanish language

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback! We have noted your points. We are pleased that you and your friends like it and that you support our idea of auto-adaptive Mixed Reality :)

reviews.review_description:
It's a great app, much like "First Encounters" from Meta but with many improvements. 

You also have an invasion but this time your furniture also changes (if it exists in the meta room model) and your whole room gets slowly transformed into a fully virtual frozen version of it. After that the invaders start to attack you.

Overall the invasion and the transformation of the room feels much more impact full this way.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good feedback! What you describe, the more pleasant and impressive transformation, was exactly our goal. We're delighted that you like it. And we are honored to be called “First Encounters improved” :)

reviews.review_description: I hope they continue to add to this game. It's already a blast, but some different modes or creatures would be neat.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good feedback! We're glad you like it. Your great review will help us to hopefully reach even more people with the technology and to be able to implement further features / applications - thanks to you! :)

reviews.review_description: I had the hardest time just grabbing the gun could never grab flashlight pressed and squeezed every button and trigger so couldnt get 2nd gun at all really cool game but need to figure out why.

developer_response.body: Hi Kristin, glad you like the game and thanks for your review. The gun and the flashlight can be grabbed by holding the big button on the side of the controller. Maybe now it works better :)

reviews.review_description: This game reminds me of first encounter. Its really fun and creative. You shoot some tree like monster that break into your environment.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good feedback! We're glad you like it :)

reviews.review_description: A fantastic game with a really cool use of MR, I love how the flashlight reveals the digital world, then your walls starts to break down when the little critters get in, it's so cool and immersive! Must try!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the good feedback! We're glad you enjoy it :)

reviews.review_description:
The idea is great. Similar to First Encounters but longer game play...great.
It would be great to see hand tracking and throwing snowballs instead using a gun.
This would be so much more fun.
The narrator talks a bit to much and repeats itself.
Keep on development...it has so much potential.

It reminds me on the Wii fit game.

Btw: an Version of excite bots (similar) racing game would be so nice to see. Waiting for it on switch but did never come. Maybe an idea for an future project?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! That is indeed a good idea / point.

Please let us know more about your ideas on Excite Bots on our Discord - we'd love to hear from you! https://discord.gg/BxUWVNs3
